from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "20": 0.025,
        "45": 0.018,
        "80": 0.012,
        "150": 0.006,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

注意：本轮代码修改必须基于 actual_session_parent_strategy_code，而不是仅把 nearest_candidate / pre_run 复盘当参考。
mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v003", "strategy_family": "breakout_momentum", "mutation_type": "add_entry_filter", "reason": "breakout_momentum 家族尚未尝试过，结构假设是：只在价格突破近期高点且伴随成交量放大时入场，天然过滤震荡区间的假信号。从 historical_best (v001 run_014140) 借鉴 MACD 趋势确认，但替换为 ATR breakout + volume spike 作为主触发，并叠加 ADX regime filter (ADX>25) 确保只在趋势明确时入场。与之前 trend_following/pullback_reversal 的小步微调不同，这是全新入场结构：用 N 周期高点突破 + 成交量倍数确认 + ADX 趋势强度门槛，从源头减少震荡期入场，降低 stoploss 触发率。父策略 v003 (session_parent) 的问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs (-19.6) 远超 roi_profit_abs (12.1)，说明入场时机差；breakout_momentum 通过要求价格已突破阻力才入场，理论上能减少被套概率。本轮 mutation_type 虽名为 add_entry_filter，但实际是全新 entry 结构重构（breakout_momentum family），与之前 run 内失败的 trend_following add_entry_filter 完全不同。", "session_parent_reason": "actual_session_parent 是 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003，训练 50 笔交易，PF=0.618，止损亏损 19.6 USDT 远超 ROI 收益 12.1 USDT。以此为代码修改基础，保留其 ROI/stoploss/trailing 参数框架，但完全重构 entry 逻辑为 breakout_momentum 结构。", "expected_effect": "预计训练交易数 25~40 笔（breakout 事件天然低频），止损触发率从当前 ~30% 降至 15~20%，训练 PF 提升至 0.8+，训练收益向 0 或正值改善。ADX>25 过滤掉震荡月份的大部分假突破。", "changes": {"entry_logic": "完全重构为 breakout_momentum：(1) close > highest(close, 20) 的前一根（即突破 20 周期高点）；(2) volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.8（成交量放大确认）；(3) ADX > 25（趋势强度门槛，过滤震荡）；(4) EMA_8 > EMA_21（短期趋势方向确认）。entry_tag='breakout_vol_adx'。", "indicators_add": ["highest_20 (ta.highest(close, 20).shift(1))", "volume_sma_20 (volume.rolling(20).mean())", "ADX_14 (ta.ADX)", "EMA_8", "EMA_21"], "indicators_remove": ["移除父策略中未被新 entry 引用的冗余指标（如 Bollinger、MACD histogram 等），保留 ATR 用于 trailing offset 计算"], "minimal_roi": "{\"0\": 0.04, \"30\": 0.025, \"60\": 0.015, \"120\": 0.008}", "stoploss": "-0.018", "trailing_stop": true, "trailing_stop_positive": 0.012, "trailing_stop_positive_offset": 0.022, "trailing_only_offset_is_reached": true, "cooldown_protection": "CooldownPeriod stop_duration_candles=5; 硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。

- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。

11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["如果采用 market regime、choppy 或 volatility contraction filter，必须在 populate_indicators 中真实计算对应指标列，并在 populate_entry_trend 中实际参与 entry 条件。", "必须真实改变 entry_conditions 或新增/替换可检测指标，不能只改参数名、类名、注释或 entry_tag 文本。", "应保持 fixed stoploss 为主要风险边界；如使用 trailing，只能作为已有盈利后的辅助，不得成为主要止损来源。", "需要维持训练交易数目标 20~60，理想 25~45，避免实现后低于 20 或高于 60。", "Bollinger 相关实现必须遵守安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']，bb_middle 只能由 bb_upper 与 bb_lower 平均计算。"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["避免仅重排条件顺序但逻辑完全相同。", "避免新增未被 entry 或 exit 实际引用的指标。", "避免新增恒真或几乎恒真的过滤条件。", "避免只修改 ROI、stoploss 或 trailing 参数而 entry 行为不变。", "避免复制上一轮 v003 这类本 run 内高度重复行为。"], "required_detectable_changes": ["至少一个新的或重构后的 regime/choppy/volatility contraction 指标列必须出现在 populate_indicators。", "populate_entry_trend 中必须出现与上述指标对应的实际过滤条件。", "entry 条件需要相对父策略有明确结构变化，例如替换低质量触发、增加震荡过滤或增加趋势确认，而不是仅调阈值。", "entry_tag 应能区分新逻辑来源，便于后续按 tag 分析 stoploss 与 ROI 表现。", "生成策略应能从代码层面看出其目标是减少 stoploss 亏损和低质量入场，同时维持 25~45 笔附近的交易节奏。"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 如果 mutation_spec 预计交易数 20~24，代码实现不得因为过度过滤把交易数压到 20 以下。
8. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
9. Bollinger 安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']；qtpylib.bollinger_bands 只允许读取 upper/lower。
10. bb_middle 必须用 dataframe['bb_middle'] = (dataframe['bb_upper'] + dataframe['bb_lower']) / 2 计算。
11. 下一轮实现应以 trend_following + market regime/choppy/volatility contraction filter 为主，不要用 trailing 直接替代 fixed stoploss。

v003 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_145000/v003/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.04,
        "30": 0.025,
        "60": 0.015,
        "120": 0.008,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_8"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=8)
        dataframe["ema_21"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=21)
        dataframe["ema_55"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=55)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_sma_20"]

        dataframe["highest_20"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max().shift(1)

        dataframe["range_20"] = (
            dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max()
            - dataframe["low"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).min()
        )
        dataframe["range_pct_20"] = dataframe["range_20"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["trend_regime"] = (dataframe["ema_21"] - dataframe["ema_55"]).abs() / dataframe["close"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            vol_mult = 2.0
            adx_min = 26
        elif pair in ["DOGE/USDT", "OP/USDT"]:
            vol_mult = 1.6
            adx_min = 24
        else:
            vol_mult = 1.8
            adx_min = 25

        breakout_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["highest_20"])

        trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["ema_8"] > dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_21"] > dataframe["ema_55"]) &
            (dataframe["trend_regime"] > 0.0018)
        )

        regime_filter = (
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > adx_min) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0022) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.032) &
            (dataframe["range_pct_20"] > 0.018) &
            (dataframe["range_pct_20"] < 0.14)
        )

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * vol_mult) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 48) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 76) &
            ((dataframe["close"] / dataframe["ema_8"]) < 1.035)
        )

        long_condition = breakout_event & trend_filter & regime_filter & quality_filter

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "breakout_vol_adx")

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

```python
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.04,
        "30": 0.025,
        "60": 0.015,
        "120": 0.008,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_8"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=8)
        dataframe["ema_21"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=21)
        dataframe["ema_55"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=55)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_sma_20"]

        dataframe["highest_20"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max().shift(1)

        dataframe["range_20"] = (
            dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max()
            - dataframe["low"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).min()
        )
        dataframe["range_pct_20"] = dataframe["range_20"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["trend_regime"] = (dataframe["ema_21"] - dataframe["ema_55"]).abs() / dataframe["close"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            vol_mult = 2.0
            adx_min = 26
        elif pair in ["DOGE/USDT", "OP/USDT"]:
            vol_mult = 1.6
            adx_min = 24
        else:
            vol_mult = 1.8
            adx_min = 25

        breakout_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["highest_20"])

        trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["ema_8"] > dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_21"] > dataframe["ema_55"]) &
            (dataframe["trend_regime"] > 0.0018)
        )

        regime_filter = (
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > adx_min) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0022) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.032) &
            (dataframe["range_pct_20"] > 0.018) &
            (dataframe["range_pct_20"] < 0.14)
        )

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * vol_mult) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 48) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 76) &
            ((dataframe["close"] / dataframe["ema_8"]) < 1.035)
        )

        long_condition = breakout_event & trend_filter & regime_filter & quality_filter

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "breakout_vol_adx")

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe
```

{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v003",
  "strategy_family": "breakout_momentum",
  "mutation_type": "add_entry_filter",
  "reason": "breakout_momentum 家族尚未尝试过，结构假设是：只在价格突破近期高点且伴随成交量放大时入场，天然过滤震荡区间的假信号。从 historical_best (v001 run_014140) 借鉴 MACD 趋势确认，但替换为 ATR breakout + volume spike 作为主触发，并叠加 ADX regime filter (ADX>25) 确保只在趋势明确时入场。与之前 trend_following/pullback_reversal 的小步微调不同，这是全新入场结构：用 N 周期高点突破 + 成交量倍数确认 + ADX 趋势强度门槛，从源头减少震荡期入场，降低 stoploss 触发率。父策略 v003 (session_parent) 的问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs (-19.6) 远超 roi_profit_abs (12.1)，说明入场时机差；breakout_momentum 通过要求价格已突破阻力才入场，理论上能减少被套概率。本轮 mutation_type 虽名为 add_entry_filter，但实际是全新 entry 结构重构（breakout_momentum family），与之前 run 内失败的 trend_following add_entry_filter 完全不同。",
  "session_parent_reason": "actual_session_parent 是 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003，训练 50 笔交易，PF=0.618，止损亏损 19.6 USDT 远超 ROI 收益 12.1 USDT。以此为代码修改基础，保留其 ROI/stoploss/trailing 参数框架，但完全重构 entry 逻辑为 breakout_momentum 结构。",
  "expected_effect": "预计训练交易数 25~40 笔（breakout 事件天然低频），止损触发率从当前 ~30% 降至 15~20%，训练 PF 提升至 0.8+，训练收益向 0 或正值改善。ADX>25 过滤掉震荡月份的大部分假突破。",
  "changes": {
    "entry_logic": "完全重构为 breakout_momentum：(1) close > highest(close, 20) 的前一根（即突破 20 周期高点）；(2) volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.8（成交量放大确认）；(3) ADX > 25（趋势强度门槛，过滤震荡）；(4) EMA_8 > EMA_21（短期趋势方向确认）。entry_tag='breakout_vol_adx'。",
    "indicators_add": ["highest_20 (ta.highest(close, 20).shift(1))", "volume_sma_20 (volume.rolling(20).mean())", "ADX_14 (ta.ADX)", "EMA_8", "EMA_21"],
    "indicators_remove": ["移除父策略中未被新 entry 引用的冗余指标（如 Bollinger、MACD histogram 等），保留 ATR 用于 trailing offset 计算"],
    "minimal_roi": "{\"0\": 0.04, \"30\": 0.025, \"60\": 0.015, \"120\": 0.008}",
    "stoploss": "-0.018",
    "trailing_stop": true,

    "use_exit_signal": false,
    "timeframe": "5m"
  },
  "do_not_change": [

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前是受控 follow-up 结构探索，不是大结构随机探索；优先围绕 trend_following 修复 regime/choppy/volatility 问题，low_volatility_mean_reversion 仅低权重尝试。

探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。

breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成已失败结构；0 交易、运行时错误、severe_high_frequency_failure 的 family 禁止继续推荐；不再要求每个 family 至少尝试一次。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 本次交易数目标由 auto_trade_count_target 自动计算，当前为 20~60，理想区间 25~45。
3. 不要生成明显高频策略，训练交易数超过 60 的策略没有意义。
4. 如果某个策略盈利但交易数低于 20，应优先轻微放宽入场，把交易数提升到 20~25，而不是换完全不同结构。
5. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
6. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
7. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。

已失败 mutation_type（避免重复）=['add_entry_filter', 'pair_specific_filter']


========== advisor 返回的本轮选择（审计）==========
本轮选择 mutation_type=reduce_trade_frequency
本轮为什么选择当前 mutation_type=本轮必须以 actual_session_parent=MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003 作为代码修改父策略，而不是仅参考 historical_best。父策略训练交易数 50，处于 20~60 目标内，但 ROI 收益被固定止损亏损吞噬，且 202603/202604 验证亏损明显，说明问题不是交易数不足，而是震荡/错误 regime 下的 trend_following 入场质量不足。上一轮 v003 虽然训练只有 17 笔且略低于目标下限，但验证期出现相对训练交易数失控：valid_mar_2026 为 35 笔、valid_feb_2026 为 48 笔，超过 train_total_trades*2.0 限制，因此本轮不能机械放宽入场，也不能切到完全不同 family；应在同一 trend_following 结构内做降频和 regime 修复。与简单小步微调不同，本轮不是只调 RSI/EMA 阈值，而是把连续宽松 momentum 入场改成“趋势 regime + 非震荡 + 波动不过热 + 事件型触发”的结构，目标是减少固定止损单数量，同时把总交易数维持在 25~45 附近。

      "volatility_filter": "新增 volatility_ok：atr14_pct 不得高于 atr_pct_rolling_median_96 的 1.75 倍，避免高波动追涨后触发固定止损；同时 bb_width_pct 不得极端低于 rolling median 的 0.70，避免无趋势噪音。",
      "trend_regime_filter": "新增 trend_regime_ok：close > ema200，ema50 > ema200，ema50_slope_6 > 0，且 ema200_slope_12 >= 0；用于保证 long-only trend_following 只在上行或至少非下行 regime 入场。",
      "bollinger_safety": "如使用 Bollinger，中轨不得直接读取 bollinger['middle']；bb_middle 只能由 bb_upper 与 bb_lower 平均计算。"
    },

      ],

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=trend_following 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v004，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
actual_session_parent_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "20": 0.025,
        "45": 0.018,
        "80": 0.012,
        "150": 0.006,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

当前失败摘要=训练区间交易数略低于目标下限，验证强度不足
硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。
11) 不允许生成完全无交易策略，也不允许超过 90 笔训练交易。
11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
上一轮失败原因：训练区间交易数略低于目标下限，验证强度不足
最近失败策略共同原因通常不是没有盈利单，而是固定止损或 trailing_stop_loss 吃掉 ROI 收益。
当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47
最近失败策略摘要：
- v004：交易数30，收益率-0.43%，PF0.60，回撤0.67%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v005：交易数103，收益率-0.70%，PF0.79，回撤1.19%，失败=severe_high_frequency_failure：交易数超过 max_trades * 1.5；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v001：交易数41，收益率-0.51%，PF0.66，回撤0.60%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v002：交易数34，收益率-0.36%，PF0.64，回撤0.49%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v003：交易数17，收益率-0.55%，PF0.41，回撤0.61%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；validation_high_frequency_failure：验证期交易数失控，超过 max_trades*1.5 或 train_total_trades*2.0，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤

当前 baseline：
- 总收益(USDT)：-7.43
- 收益率(%)：-0.74
- Profit Factor：0.63
- 最大回撤(%)：1.45
- 交易数：47
输出要求：
- 只输出可运行的完整 Python 策略代码，不要解释。
- 必须真实落地 mutation_spec，不能只改 class name、不能只改注释、不能只改变量名。
- 必须至少改变一个可由 fingerprint 检测到的策略结构：entry_conditions / pair-specific branch / indicator / ROI / stoploss / protections 之一。
- 如果 mutation_spec.mutation_type 是 pair_specific_filter、tag_specific_filter、add_entry_filter、tighten_entry_trigger，必须在 populate_entry_trend 中生成对应的实际条件，并影响 enter_long。
- 如果 mutation_spec 要求 ETH/USDT 专属过滤，代码里必须出现明确的 ETH/USDT 分支或等价 pair-specific 条件（例如 metadata['pair'] == 'ETH/USDT' 或 pair 变量判断）。
- 如果 mutation_spec 要求新增指标（ema20、ema50、adx、atr_pct、bollinger_middleband、volume_mean_20 等），必须在 populate_indicators 中实际计算这些 dataframe 列，并在入场条件中引用相关列。
- Bollinger 安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']；qtpylib.bollinger_bands 只允许安全读取 upper/lower。
- 如果需要 bb_middle，必须先计算 bb_upper/bb_lower，再写 dataframe['bb_middle'] = (dataframe['bb_upper'] + dataframe['bb_lower']) / 2。
- 避免把入场条件写成几乎永远不触发的苛刻组合。

========== 本次运行开始前 AI 复盘总结：codegen_guidance ==========
内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["如果采用 market regime、choppy 或 volatility contraction filter，必须在 populate_indicators 中真实计算对应指标列，并在 populate_entry_trend 中实际参与 entry 条件。", "必须真实改变 entry_conditions 或新增/替换可检测指标，不能只改参数名、类名、注释或 entry_tag 文本。", "应保持 fixed stoploss 为主要风险边界；如使用 trailing，只能作为已有盈利后的辅助，不得成为主要止损来源。", "需要维持训练交易数目标 20~60，理想 25~45，避免实现后低于 20 或高于 60。", "Bollinger 相关实现必须遵守安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']，bb_middle 只能由 bb_upper 与 bb_lower 平均计算。"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["避免仅重排条件顺序但逻辑完全相同。", "避免新增未被 entry 或 exit 实际引用的指标。", "避免新增恒真或几乎恒真的过滤条件。", "避免只修改 ROI、stoploss 或 trailing 参数而 entry 行为不变。", "避免复制上一轮 v003 这类本 run 内高度重复行为。"], "required_detectable_changes": ["至少一个新的或重构后的 regime/choppy/volatility contraction 指标列必须出现在 populate_indicators。", "populate_entry_trend 中必须出现与上述指标对应的实际过滤条件。", "entry 条件需要相对父策略有明确结构变化，例如替换低质量触发、增加震荡过滤或增加趋势确认，而不是仅调阈值。", "entry_tag 应能区分新逻辑来源，便于后续按 tag 分析 stoploss 与 ROI 表现。", "生成策略应能从代码层面看出其目标是减少 stoploss 亏损和低质量入场，同时维持 25~45 笔附近的交易节奏。"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 如果 mutation_spec 预计交易数 20~24，代码实现不得因为过度过滤把交易数压到 20 以下。
8. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
9. Bollinger 安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']；qtpylib.bollinger_bands 只允许读取 upper/lower。
10. bb_middle 必须用 dataframe['bb_middle'] = (dataframe['bb_upper'] + dataframe['bb_lower']) / 2 计算。
11. 下一轮实现应以 trend_following + market regime/choppy/volatility contraction filter 为主，不要用 trailing 直接替代 fixed stoploss。

v004 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_145000/v004/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.032,
        "25": 0.023,
        "55": 0.016,
        "95": 0.010,
        "180": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.014

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.011
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.024
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 260

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 14,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 22,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["ema50_slope_6"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)
        dataframe["ema200_slope_12"] = (dataframe["ema_200"] - dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)) / dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_slope_3"] = dataframe["adx14"] - dataframe["adx14"].shift(3)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd_hist"] = macd["macdhist"]
        dataframe["macd_hist_slope_3"] = dataframe["macd_hist"] - dataframe["macd_hist"].shift(3)

        dataframe["atr14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr14_pct"] = dataframe["atr14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] = dataframe["atr14_pct"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).median()

        bb = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bb["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bb["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] + dataframe["bb_lower"]) / 2
        dataframe["bb_width_pct"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] = dataframe["bb_width_pct"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).median()

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        dataframe["trend_regime_ok"] = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_6"] > 0.0) &
            (dataframe["ema200_slope_12"] >= 0.0)
        )

        dataframe["choppy_market"] = (
            ((dataframe["adx14"] < 18) & (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"])) |
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_6"].abs() < 0.0006)
        )

        dataframe["volatility_ok"] = (
            (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.75) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] > dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 0.70) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 2.60)
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")
        allowed_pairs = {"BTC/USDT", "OP/USDT", "SOL/USDT", "BNB/USDT", "DOGE/USDT"}
        if pair not in allowed_pairs:
            return dataframe

        adx_quality = (
            (dataframe["adx14"] >= 20) |
            ((dataframe["adx14"] >= 18) & (dataframe["adx_slope_3"] > 0))
        )

        base_filters = (
            dataframe["trend_regime_ok"] &
            (~dataframe["choppy_market"]) &
            dataframe["volatility_ok"] &
            adx_quality &
            (dataframe["macd_hist"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["macd_hist_slope_3"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 47) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 66) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.85) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            ((dataframe["close"] / dataframe["ema_50"]) < 1.035) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
        )

        pair_filter = dataframe["volume"] > 0
        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.90) &
                (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.60)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["adx14"] >= 19) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] > dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 0.80)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 49) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 67)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.88) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.95) &
                (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.65) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 64)
            )

        macd_cross_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_hist"], 0)
        reclaim_ema50_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_50"])

        macd_event_window = (
            macd_cross_event |
            macd_cross_event.shift(1) |
            macd_cross_event.shift(2)
        ).fillna(False)

        reclaim_event_window = (
            reclaim_ema50_event |
            reclaim_ema50_event.shift(1) |
            reclaim_ema50_event.shift(2)
        ).fillna(False)

        setup_macd_raw = base_filters & pair_filter & macd_event_window
        setup_reclaim_raw = base_filters & pair_filter & reclaim_event_window & (~setup_macd_raw)

        setup_any_raw = (setup_macd_raw | setup_reclaim_raw).astype(int)
        cooldown_ok = (setup_any_raw.shift(1).rolling(window=20, min_periods=1).max().fillna(0) < 1)

        enter_macd = setup_macd_raw & cooldown_ok
        enter_reclaim = setup_reclaim_raw & cooldown_ok

        dataframe.loc[enter_macd, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "trend_regime_macd_event")
        dataframe.loc[enter_reclaim, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "trend_regime_chop_filtered")

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

```python
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.032,
        "25": 0.023,
        "55": 0.016,
        "95": 0.010,
        "180": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.014

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.011
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.024
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 260

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 14,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 22,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["ema50_slope_6"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)
        dataframe["ema200_slope_12"] = (dataframe["ema_200"] - dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)) / dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_slope_3"] = dataframe["adx14"] - dataframe["adx14"].shift(3)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd_hist"] = macd["macdhist"]
        dataframe["macd_hist_slope_3"] = dataframe["macd_hist"] - dataframe["macd_hist"].shift(3)

        dataframe["atr14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr14_pct"] = dataframe["atr14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] = dataframe["atr14_pct"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).median()

        bb = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bb["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bb["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] + dataframe["bb_lower"]) / 2
        dataframe["bb_width_pct"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] = dataframe["bb_width_pct"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).median()

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        dataframe["trend_regime_ok"] = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_6"] > 0.0) &
            (dataframe["ema200_slope_12"] >= 0.0)
        )

        dataframe["choppy_market"] = (
            ((dataframe["adx14"] < 18) & (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"])) |
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_6"].abs() < 0.0006)
        )

        dataframe["volatility_ok"] = (
            (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.75) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] > dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 0.70) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 2.60)
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")
        allowed_pairs = {"BTC/USDT", "OP/USDT", "SOL/USDT", "BNB/USDT", "DOGE/USDT"}
        if pair not in allowed_pairs:
            return dataframe

        adx_quality = (
            (dataframe["adx14"] >= 20) |
            ((dataframe["adx14"] >= 18) & (dataframe["adx_slope_3"] > 0))
        )

        base_filters = (
            dataframe["trend_regime_ok"] &
            (~dataframe["choppy_market"]) &
            dataframe["volatility_ok"] &
            adx_quality &
            (dataframe["macd_hist"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["macd_hist_slope_3"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 47) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 66) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.85) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            ((dataframe["close"] / dataframe["ema_50"]) < 1.035) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
        )

        pair_filter = dataframe["volume"] > 0
        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.90) &
                (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.60)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["adx14"] >= 19) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] > dataframe["bb_width_rolling_median_96"] * 0.80)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 49) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 67)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.88) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] >= 0.95) &
                (dataframe["atr14_pct"] < dataframe["atr_pct_rolling_median_96"] * 1.65) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 64)
            )

        macd_cross_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_hist"], 0)
        reclaim_ema50_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_50"])

        macd_event_window = (
            macd_cross_event |
            macd_cross_event.shift(1) |
            macd_cross_event.shift(2)
        ).fillna(False)

        reclaim_event_window = (
            reclaim_ema50_event |
            reclaim_ema50_event.shift(1) |
            reclaim_ema50_event.shift(2)
        ).fillna(False)

        setup_macd_raw = base_filters & pair_filter & macd_event_window
        setup_reclaim_raw = base_filters & pair_filter & reclaim_event_window & (~setup_macd_raw)

        setup_any_raw = (setup_macd_raw | setup_reclaim_raw).astype(int)
        cooldown_ok = (setup_any_raw.shift(1).rolling(window=20, min_periods=1).max().fillna(0) < 1)

        enter_macd = setup_macd_raw & cooldown_ok
        enter_reclaim = setup_reclaim_raw & cooldown_ok

        dataframe.loc[enter_macd, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "trend_regime_macd_event")
        dataframe.loc[enter_reclaim, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (1, "trend_regime_chop_filtered")

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe
```

- v002：交易数34，收益率-0.36%，PF0.64，回撤0.49%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v003：交易数17，收益率-0.55%，PF0.41，回撤0.61%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；validation_high_frequency_failure：验证期交易数失控，超过 max_trades*1.5 或 train_total_trades*2.0，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v004：交易数31，收益率-0.17%，PF0.81，回撤0.34%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=final_score<=0
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss、盲目 remove_bad_entry_condition。优先：add_regime_filter、avoid_choppy_market_filter、volatility contraction filter、pair_specific_filter、tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。下一轮策略方向：不要继续大结构随机探索；以 trend_following 为主，low_volatility_mean_reversion 仅低权重尝试。目标不是增加交易数，而是减少固定止损亏损。v001/v004 的共同问题是 ROI 收益为正但固定止损亏损更大，202602 能盈利但 202604/202603 亏损；这说明优先需要 market regime filter，而不是简单放宽或收紧入场。优先 mutation/方案：add_regime_filter、pair_specific_stoploss_or_entry_threshold、avoid_choppy_market_filter、volatility contraction filter。暂停：breakout_momentum、盲目 remove_bad_entry_condition、简单 adjust_roi、直接用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前是受控 follow-up 结构探索，不是大结构随机探索；优先围绕 trend_following 修复 regime/choppy/volatility 问题，low_volatility_mean_reversion 仅低权重尝试。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=pullback_reversal
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许为 market regime filter / choppy market filter / volatility contraction filter 重构指标和 entry 条件，但不要随机切换到高频 breakout_momentum。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成已失败结构；0 交易、运行时错误、severe_high_frequency_failure 的 family 禁止继续推荐；不再要求每个 family 至少尝试一次。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。

1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 本次交易数目标由 auto_trade_count_target 自动计算，当前为 20~60，理想区间 25~45。
3. 不要生成明显高频策略，训练交易数超过 60 的策略没有意义。
4. 如果某个策略盈利但交易数低于 20，应优先轻微放宽入场，把交易数提升到 20~25，而不是换完全不同结构。
5. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
6. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
7. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=pullback_reversal 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v005，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
actual_session_parent_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "20": 0.025,
        "45": 0.018,
        "80": 0.012,
        "150": 0.006,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

注意：本轮代码修改必须基于 actual_session_parent_strategy_code，而不是仅把 nearest_candidate / pre_run 复盘当参考。

硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 如果 mutation_spec 预计交易数 20~24，代码实现不得因为过度过滤把交易数压到 20 以下。
8. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
9. Bollinger 安全规则：禁止直接使用 bollinger['middle']；qtpylib.bollinger_bands 只允许读取 upper/lower。
10. bb_middle 必须用 dataframe['bb_middle'] = (dataframe['bb_upper'] + dataframe['bb_lower']) / 2 计算。
11. 下一轮实现应以 trend_following + market regime/choppy/volatility contraction filter 为主，不要用 trailing 直接替代 fixed stoploss。

文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_145000/v005/strategy.py

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.032,
        "18": 0.024,
        "42": 0.017,
        "78": 0.011,
        "140": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.014

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.011
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.020
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["ema_50_slope_6"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)
        )
        dataframe["ema_200_slope_12"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_200"] - dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)) / dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_delta_3"] = dataframe["adx_14"] - dataframe["adx_14"].shift(3)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram_delta"] = dataframe["macd_histogram"] - dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)
        dataframe["macd_histogram_improving"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            & (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] + dataframe["bb_lower"]) / 2
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).mean()
        dataframe["bb_width_q10_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).quantile(0.10)
        dataframe["bb_width_q90_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).quantile(0.90)

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_mean_20"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_mean_20"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["pullback_ema20_recent"] = (
            (dataframe["low"] < dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.997).rolling(window=8, min_periods=1).max()
        )
        dataframe["pullback_bb_recent"] = (
            (dataframe["low"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"] * 1.01).rolling(window=8, min_periods=1).max()
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        regime_filter = (
            ((dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) | (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]))
            & ((dataframe["ema_50_slope_6"] > 0) | (dataframe["ema_200_slope_12"] >= 0))
            & (dataframe["adx_14"] > 17)
            & (dataframe["adx_delta_3"] > -3.0)
        )

        volatility_filter = (
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.003)
            & (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.035)
            & (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.8)
        )

        choppy_filter = (
            ((dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_q10_96"]) | (dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] * 0.75))
            & ((dataframe["bb_width"] < dataframe["bb_width_q90_96"] * 1.10) | (dataframe["bb_width"] < dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] * 1.90))
        )

        pullback_recent = (
            (dataframe["pullback_ema20_recent"] > 0) | (dataframe["pullback_bb_recent"] > 0)
        )

        price_reclaim_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"])
        rsi_reclaim_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 42)
        break_prev_high = dataframe["close"] > dataframe["high"].shift(1)

        momentum_recovery = (
            dataframe["macd_histogram_improving"]
            | qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)
            | ((dataframe["macd_histogram"] < 0) & (dataframe["macd_histogram_delta"] > 0))
        )

        confirmation = (
            ((price_reclaim_event & break_prev_high) | (rsi_reclaim_event & (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])))
            & momentum_recovery
        )

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 62)
            & (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            & (dataframe["volume"] >= dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.92)
            & (dataframe["close"] < dataframe["ema_50"] * 1.03)
        )

        long_condition = (
            regime_filter
            & volatility_filter
            & choppy_filter
            & pullback_recent
            & confirmation
            & quality_filter
        )

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "pullback_reversal_regime_confirmed",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe
