from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_145000_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.032,
        "18": 0.024,
        "42": 0.017,
        "78": 0.011,
        "140": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.014

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.011
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.020
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["ema_50_slope_6"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(6)
        )
        dataframe["ema_200_slope_12"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_200"] - dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)) / dataframe["ema_200"].shift(12)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_delta_3"] = dataframe["adx_14"] - dataframe["adx_14"].shift(3)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram_delta"] = dataframe["macd_histogram"] - dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)
        dataframe["macd_histogram_improving"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            & (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] + dataframe["bb_lower"]) / 2
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).mean()
        dataframe["bb_width_q10_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).quantile(0.10)
        dataframe["bb_width_q90_96"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=96, min_periods=48).quantile(0.90)

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_mean_20"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_mean_20"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["pullback_ema20_recent"] = (
            (dataframe["low"] < dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.997).rolling(window=8, min_periods=1).max()
        )
        dataframe["pullback_bb_recent"] = (
            (dataframe["low"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"] * 1.01).rolling(window=8, min_periods=1).max()
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        regime_filter = (
            ((dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) | (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]))
            & ((dataframe["ema_50_slope_6"] > 0) | (dataframe["ema_200_slope_12"] >= 0))
            & (dataframe["adx_14"] > 17)
            & (dataframe["adx_delta_3"] > -3.0)
        )

        volatility_filter = (
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.003)
            & (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.035)
            & (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.8)
        )

        choppy_filter = (
            ((dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_q10_96"]) | (dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] * 0.75))
            & ((dataframe["bb_width"] < dataframe["bb_width_q90_96"] * 1.10) | (dataframe["bb_width"] < dataframe["bb_width_mean_96"] * 1.90))
        )

        pullback_recent = (
            (dataframe["pullback_ema20_recent"] > 0) | (dataframe["pullback_bb_recent"] > 0)
        )

        price_reclaim_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"])
        rsi_reclaim_event = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 42)
        break_prev_high = dataframe["close"] > dataframe["high"].shift(1)

        momentum_recovery = (
            dataframe["macd_histogram_improving"]
            | qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)
            | ((dataframe["macd_histogram"] < 0) & (dataframe["macd_histogram_delta"] > 0))
        )

        confirmation = (
            ((price_reclaim_event & break_prev_high) | (rsi_reclaim_event & (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])))
            & momentum_recovery
        )

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 62)
            & (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            & (dataframe["volume"] >= dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.92)
            & (dataframe["close"] < dataframe["ema_50"] * 1.03)
        )

        long_condition = (
            regime_filter
            & volatility_filter
            & choppy_filter
            & pullback_recent
            & confirmation
            & quality_filter
        )

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "pullback_reversal_regime_confirmed",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

  "reason": "选择 pullback_reversal 的结构假设是：在 5 个固定交易对中，直接追涨或宽松 momentum 容易在 202603/202604 震荡期触发固定止损；改为只在中期趋势仍可接受、价格完成回撤后出现反转确认时入场，以减少低质量追入和固定止损数量。历史 official champion 的可借鉴点是交易数约 36、回撤低、胜率高、ROI 收益为正，但其 BTC/ETH 类弱势段仍被少数止损拖累；父策略 v003 的可借鉴点是交易数 50 合格且 202602 有盈利能力，但需要过滤 202603/202604 的震荡噪声。本轮不是继续上一轮失败的 add_entry_filter/pair_specific_filter/reduce_trade_frequency，也不是简单小步调 RSI/EMA 阈值，而是重构 pullback 触发：从“出现动量就进”改为“趋势背景合格 + 回撤完成 + 反转确认 + 非极端波动”的组合触发，目标是减少 stoploss 亏损而非增加交易数量。",
